accessibility.text: The beer market has been stagnant since 2008, highly competitive and price-sensitive. Our understanding of these dynamics is crucial in positioning Kamenitza not just as a choice but as a preference. We'll leverage this understanding to highlight Kamenitza's unique qualities, making it stand out in a crowded market.
